homepage_slots_content_check.name: homepage_slots_content_check
homepage_slots_content_check.value: ("homepage_slots"."contentType" = 'post' and "homepage_slots"."postId" is not null) or ("homepage_slots"."contentType" = 'offer' and "homepage_slots"."offerId" is not null) or ("homepage_slots"."contentType" = 'image_link' and "homepage_slots"."imageAssetId" is not null)

homepage_slots_schedule_check.name: homepage_slots_schedule_check
homepage_slots_schedule_check.value: "homepage_slots"."endsAt" is null or "homepage_slots"."startsAt" is null or "homepage_slots"."endsAt" > "homepage_slots"."startsAt"

server_offers_providerId_externalProduct.name: server_offers_providerId_externalProductId_unique
server_offers_providerId_externalProduct.where: "server_offers"."providerId" is not null and "server_offers"."externalProductId" is not null
